project_context.name: ForgeFPS
project_context.aesthetic: Monospace/tech 'command console' vibe, near-black, neon accents, sharp edges.

typography.headings: Chakra Petch, Rajdhani, or Space Mono. (Technical, aggressive, sharp).
typography.body: Inter or DM Sans (highly readable at small sizes for data).
typography.mono: JetBrains Mono or Fira Code for all command console text, eyebrows, metrics, and terminal lines.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight uppercase

visual_enhancers.grids: Use a subtle grid background: bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,#80808012_1px,transparent_1px),linear-gradient(to_bottom,#80808012_1px,transparent_1px)] bg-[size:24px_24px]
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Panels MUST have a 1px solid border (border-[#27272A]). Avoid glassmorphism blur unless for sticky headers. No soft drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Replace soft shadows with 'Inner Glow' highlights (shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)]) or sharp 1px solid drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.decorations: Use `//` prefix for eyebrows (e.g., `// SYSTEM STATUS`). Use brackets for badges `[ OK ]`.

layouts.general: High-density, modular grid layouts resembling a command center or terminal. Padding should be generous within main containers (p-8 to p-12) but internal components can be dense.
layouts.bento: Use bento grid protocol (High Density) for data dashboards and features. gap-4 or gap-6.
layouts.alignment: Content inside should be left-aligned and structured. Never center-align paragraphs. Hero text left-aligned.

motion.hover: Slight fast scale or border color shift to Volt Yellow. No bouncy springs.
motion.scan_demo: Simulate console logs using framer-motion stagger. Use a 'laser sweep' animation (a vertical line scanning down the panel) for the 'scanning' state.

buttons.primary: Sharp edges (rounded-none), flat background. bg-[#E5FF00] text-black font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[#D4E800].
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] text-white uppercase hover:border-[#E5FF00] hover:text-[#E5FF00].

components.console_window: A terminal-like panel with a header. Content is mono-spaced with glowing text highlights for metrics.
components.trust_badges: Minimalist mono text with checkmarks. e.g., `[ ✓ ] SHA-256 VERIFIED`. text-sm font-mono text-[#00FF66].
components.cards: border border-[#27272A] bg-[#0F0F12] p-6 hover:border-[#404040] transition-colors rounded-none

homepage.hero: Technical hero: 'Find FPS bottlenecks. Optimize latency. Improve gaming performance safely.' CTA: 'Run Free Scan'. Left aligned.
homepage.secure_installer: Replace old terminal block with Secure Installer Card. Show download button, version, and Trust Badges (Signed by ForgeFPS, SHA256 verified, Secure installer, Transparent updates).
homepage.interactive_demo: Terminal UI simulating a scan. User clicks 'Scan'. Shows RTX 4070 + Ryzen 7 5800X. Animates scanning state. Results: ⚠ Background processes, ⚠ NVIDIA latency settings, ⚠ OBS config. Improvement: +12-18 FPS, -8ms latency. CTA: 'Analyze my PC'.

security.layout: Technical documentation style. Architecture diagram showing Windows Agent -> Encrypted API -> AI Analysis. Bento grid for Trust Badges (Local-first, No password collection, No telemetry selling, Signed binaries, Transparent changelog).

privacy_telemetry.layout: Two columns: 'COLLECTED' (Green checks) vs 'NEVER COLLECTED' (Red crosses). Section explaining 'LOCAL ONLY' mode. Tiering comparison (Free, Cloud AI, Pro).

changelog.layout: Timeline view. Version & Date on left. Added, Fixed, Changed with distinct color tags on right.

pricing.layout: 3 tiers (FREE, PRO €9.99/mo, CREATOR €19.99/mo). Highlight PRO with Volt border. Feature lists with monospace ticks.

bilingual_guidelines.instructions: Implement a simple dictionary-based i18n for IT/EN. Ensure UI handles longer Italian strings without breaking grid layouts.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT install Shadcn components if they use heavy rounded corners. If you do, override rounded-md/lg to rounded-none.
Focus on building the 6 specified pages/sections with Framer Motion for the Interactive Demo Scan.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide for precise, technical icons.
No remote installer scripts (no irm/iex). Implement the Secure Installer presentation card.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
NEVER use fully transparent backgrounds for headers or overlays that have content underneath.
Preserve the 'Command Console' vibe: uppercase monospace eyebrows, sharp edges, dark backgrounds with high-contrast neon accents.
